productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Adizero Slide Blue Flip Flops
description: Designed in the typical adiZero style with a fast and sporty look, these AdiZero slides from adidas are absolutely comfortable and waterproof as well, which helps you wear them in and out of the shower. Slide into them on rainy days or when at the pool and flaunt your feet in style. Upper Wide synthetic leather strap for absolute forefoot support Adjustable strap with a mildly padded synthetic inner lining for a snug, customize Fit Supersoft EVA footbed with quick drying properties Brand name engraved into the footbed for style and to offer absolute grip in wet conditions Outsole Injected EVA outsole for lightweight comfort Horizontal grooves and lugs in the forefoot and heel, with waffle pattern lugs in the lateral forefoot for absolute grip Suction holes on the waffle pattern lugs and lateral heel for absolute grip and stability on wet surfaces Slide care Wash away dust under softly running water Wipe off excess water with a dry, clean cloth Do not store in direct sunlight
